urdu transliteration text: Ay ladle Hasan ke mehendi hai teri aayi
english translation text: Oh the beloved of Hasan, your mehendi has come

urdu transliteration text: Arman bhare dil se hamsheer ne banayi
english translation text: (The mehendi) that your sister has made with lots of hope and desire

urdu transliteration text: Ay ladle Hasan ke mehendi hai teri aayi
english translation text: Oh the beloved of Hasan, your mehendi has come

urdu transliteration text:
Sakina said, Qasim has become a groom
Qaasam bane hai dulha kehne lagee Sakina

Alas Sughra couldn’t see you like this
Afsos tumhe bhaiya Sughra na deikh paee
Ay ladle Hasan ke mehendi hai teri aayi
english translation text: Oh the beloved of Hasan, your mehendi has come

urdu transliteration text: Mithi me mil raha tha ibne Hasan ka sehra
english translation text: The son of Hasan’s sehra has been covered in dust

urdu transliteration text:
Picking up the pieces Sakina brings it to Zaynab
larya utha Sakina Zaynab ke paas layi
Ay ladle Hasan ke mehendi hai teri aayi
english translation text: Oh the beloved of Hasan, your mehendi has come

urdu transliteration text: Paamal ho rahi Shabbar teri nishani
english translation text: That which was a reminder of Shabbar(I.Hasan) is being trampled

urdu transliteration text: Qasim ki laash kaise Shabbir ne uthayi
english translation text: How did Shabbir (I.Husayn) lift the body of Qasim

urdu transliteration text: Ay ladle Hasan ke mehendi hai teri aayi
english translation text: Oh the beloved of Hasan, your mehendi has come
